info.name: Skill Workshop Management System API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Skill Workshop Management System backend. Covers Auth, User, Category, Workshop (Levels), Enrollment, Payment, OTP, Stats, Audit, and Health endpoints.

## Quick Start
1. Set `base_url` to your local server (default: http://localhost:5000/api/v1)
2. Run the "0. Setup - Get CSRF Token" request first
3. Run "1. Auth / Login" to get access tokens (auto-saved)
4. All protected endpoints use `{{admin_access_token}}` or `{{user_access_token}`

## Variables
- `base_url` — API base URL
- `admin_email` / `admin_password` — Admin credentials
- `user_email` / `user_password` — Regular user credentials
- `admin_access_token` / `user_access_token` — Auto-populated after login
- `csrf_token` — Auto-populated from setup

item.name: 0. Setup
item.description: Initial setup requests — get CSRF token required for state-changing operations.

request.description: Fetches a CSRF token from the server. Required for POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE requests.
Root health endpoint — confirms the backend is running.

item.name: 1. Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: login, logout, refresh token, change password, forgot/reset password, and Google OAuth.

request.description:
Login with email and password. Returns accessToken, refreshToken (in cookie), and user data.

The accessToken is auto-saved as `admin_access_token`.

Password rules: min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special character.
Login as a regular student user. Token is auto-saved as `user_access_token`.
Refresh the access token using the refresh token stored in cookies. No body required — the refresh token is sent automatically via cookies.
Logout the current user. Blacklists the refresh token and clears cookies.

Change the authenticated user's password. Requires both old and new password.

New password rules: min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special character.

**Role**: Any authenticated user (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, INSTRUCTOR, STUDENT)

Set a password for users who registered via Google OAuth (social auth users without a password).

Password rules: min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special character.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

Request a password reset email. Sends a reset token to the user's email address.

No authentication required.

query.description: The reset token received via email (provided by checkResetToken middleware)

request.description:
Reset password using a token received from /forgot-password.

The `token` query parameter is the reset token sent to the user's email.

No authentication required — the token serves as identification.

query.description: URL to redirect after successful Google login

request.description:
Initiate Google OAuth login. Redirects to Google's consent screen.

**Note**: This endpoint is designed for browser-based flow. Testing in Postman will return a redirect URL.

Google OAuth callback endpoint. Handles the response from Google after authentication.

**Note**: This is typically called by the browser, not directly via Postman.

item.name: 2. User
item.description:
User management endpoints: registration, profile, listing, updating, and soft-delete.

**Role legend**:
- ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN: Full access
- All roles: Own profile (GET /me, PATCH /:id own resource)

request.description:
Register a new user. No authentication required.

**Required fields**: name (2-50 chars), email, password

**Password rules**: min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special char (!@#$%^&*)

**Phone**: Must be valid Bangladesh format: +8801XXXXXXXXX or 01XXXXXXXXX

**Default role**: STUDENT

Get the current authenticated user's profile.

**Role**: Any authenticated user (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, INSTRUCTOR, STUDENT)

query.description: Search by name, email, or address

request.description:
Get all users with pagination and search.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN only

**Query params**: page, limit, searchTerm

Get a single user by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN only

Update a user by ID.

**Role**: Any authenticated user (can update own profile). ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN can update anyone.

**Updatable fields**: name, phone, age, address, isActive, isVerified, role, isDeleted, password

**isActive values**: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, BLOCKED
**role values**: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, INSTRUCTOR, STUDENT

Soft-delete a user by ID. The user is marked as deleted but not removed from the database.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN only

item.name: 3. Category
item.description:
Category CRUD endpoints. Categories group workshops into topics.

**Role legend**:
- Create/Update/Delete: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN
- Read: Public (no auth required)

formdata.value: Learn modern web development technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js.

request.description:
Create a new category with an optional thumbnail image.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

**Content-Type**: multipart/form-data

**Fields**: name (required), description (optional), file (optional — thumbnail image)

Get all categories. No authentication required.

Returns all active categories with their thumbnails.

Get a single category by its slug. No authentication required.

Replace `web-development` with the actual category slug.

formdata.value: Advanced web development workshops covering full-stack technologies.

request.description:
Update a category by ID with optional new thumbnail.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

**Content-Type**: multipart/form-data

Soft-delete a category by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

item.name: 4. Workshop - Levels
item.description:
Workshop level management (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced).

**Role**: Create/Update/Delete requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN. Read is public.

request.description: Get all workshop levels. No authentication required.
Get a single level by ID. No authentication required.

Create a new workshop level.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

**Example values**: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced

Update a level by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

Delete a level by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

item.name: 5. Workshop
item.description:
Workshop CRUD endpoints. Workshops are the core entity — they belong to a category and have a level.

**Role**: Create/Update/Delete requires ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN, or INSTRUCTOR. Read is public.

request.description: Get all workshops with pagination and search. No authentication required.
Get a single workshop by its slug. No authentication required.

formdata.value: A comprehensive workshop covering React.js fundamentals including components, hooks, state management, and routing. Perfect for beginners who want to build modern web applications.

formdata.description: Workshop images (up to 10 files, uploaded to Cloudinary)

request.description:
Create a new workshop.

**Role**: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN, or INSTRUCTOR

**Content-Type**: multipart/form-data

**Required fields**: title, level, category

**Optional fields**: description (max 5000 chars), location, price, startDate, endDate, whatYouLearn (array, max 20), prerequisites (array, max 20), benefits (array, max 20), syllabus (array, max 50), maxSeats (min 1), minAge, files (up to 10 images)

Update a workshop by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN, or INSTRUCTOR

**Content-Type**: multipart/form-data

**All fields optional**. Use `deleteImages` (JSON body field) to specify image URLs to remove.

Soft-delete a workshop by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN, or INSTRUCTOR

item.name: 6. Enrollment
item.description:
Enrollment management. Users enroll in workshops through this module.

**Role legend**:
- Create enrollment: Any authenticated user
- View all enrollments: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN
- View/Update/Cancel own: Any authenticated user

request.description:
Create a new enrollment for a workshop.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

**Required fields**: workshop (MongoDB ObjectId), studentCount (positive integer)

Get all enrollments. Admin view.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

Get the current user's enrollments.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

Get a single enrollment by ID.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

Update enrollment status.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

**Status values**: PENDING, CANCEL, COMPLETE, FAILED

Cancel an enrollment.

**Role**: Any authenticated user (can cancel own enrollments)

item.name: 7. Payment
item.description:
Payment processing via SSLCommerz. Handles payment initialization, callbacks, invoices, and refunds.

**Note**: success/fail/cancel endpoints are called by SSLCommerz — they support both GET and POST.

request.description:
Initialize payment for an enrollment via SSLCommerz.

**Role**: STUDENT only

Returns a `gatewayUrl` that the frontend should redirect the user to.

Payment success callback — called by SSLCommerz via browser redirect.

**Note**: Also accepts POST for IPN.
Payment success callback via POST (IPN or direct POST from gateway).

Payment failure callback — called by SSLCommerz via browser redirect.

**Note**: Also accepts POST.
Payment failure callback via POST.

Payment cancellation callback — called by SSLCommerz via browser redirect.

**Note**: Also accepts POST.
Payment cancellation callback via POST.

Get the invoice download URL for a completed payment.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

Manually validate a payment using the SSLCommerz `val_id`.

**Role**: Any authenticated user

**Required fields**: val_id

SSLCommerz Instant Payment Notification (IPN) endpoint.

Called asynchronously by SSLCommerz to notify about payment status changes. No authentication required — this is a server-to-server call.

Refund a payment.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN only

**Required fields**: paymentId
**Optional fields**: reason

item.name: 8. OTP
item.description:
OTP (One-Time Password) verification for email and phone.

No authentication required for either endpoint.

request.description:
Send an OTP to the user's email or phone.

No authentication required.

Provide either `email` or `phone` in the body.

Verify an OTP sent to the user's email or phone.

**Required fields**: otp, and either email or phone

item.name: 9. Stats
item.description:
Admin dashboard statistics. Provides aggregated data for enrollments, payments, users, and workshops.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN only for all endpoints.

request.description:
Get enrollment statistics (counts by status, trends, etc.).

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

Get payment statistics (revenue, transaction counts, etc.).

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

Get user statistics (total users, by role, by status, etc.).

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

Get workshop statistics (total workshops, by category, by level, etc.).

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

item.name: 10. Audit
item.description:
Audit trail endpoints for tracking all CRUD operations in the system.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN only for all endpoints.

query.description: Filter by collection (e.g., User, Payment, Workshop, Enrollment)
Filter by action: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE
Filter by user ID who performed the action
Filter by the document ID that was affected

request.description:
Get paginated audit logs with optional filters.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

**Available filters**: page, limit, collectionName, action, performedBy, documentId, startDate, endDate

Get a single audit log entry by ID.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

item.name: 11. Health
item.description:
Health check and monitoring endpoints. Used for monitoring, uptime checks, and deployment verification.

Most endpoints are public. The dashboard endpoint requires admin auth.

request.description:
Root health endpoint. Returns a welcome message confirming the backend is running.

No authentication required.

Simple ping endpoint — returns `pong`. Use for uptime monitoring.

No authentication required.

Returns API version (1.0.0), server timestamp, and running status.

No authentication required.

Returns detailed health status: ok/degraded, timestamp, and process uptime in seconds.

No authentication required.

Advanced health dashboard for administrators.

**Role**: ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN

Returns:
- Overall status (healthy/degraded)
- Redis memory usage and connection status
- MongoDB connection status and latency
- BullMQ mail queue length (waiting + active + delayed + failed)
- Response time and uptime
